Asphalt Maintenance & Repair Services

Protect Your Investment with Expert Asphalt Maintenance

Professional asphalt maintenance services in Central Ohio since 1999. From sealcoating to crack sealing, patching to preventative maintenance — we help you extend pavement life and save thousands on costly repairs. Licensed, insured, and trusted by property owners across the region.

26+ Years Experience
5,000+ Properties Maintained
4.5★ Google Rating
Get Free Estimate Call (740) 453-3063
Comprehensive Maintenance Solutions

Our Asphalt Maintenance Services

Preventative maintenance and expert repairs to protect your pavement and maximize your investment.

01

Sealcoating

Professional sealcoating application to protect your asphalt from water damage, UV degradation, and chemical spills while restoring that fresh, black appearance.

  • Surface cleaning & preparation
  • Premium commercial-grade sealer
  • Two-coat application for maximum protection
  • Extends pavement life 3-5 years per application
  • Enhances curb appeal & property value
  • Fast 24-48 hour cure time
$0.35per sq ft · residential driveways
Get Estimate
02

Crack Sealing

Hot-applied rubberized crack sealer to prevent water infiltration and stop small cracks from becoming expensive repairs.

  • Crack routing & cleaning
  • Hot-pour rubberized sealant
  • Flexible seal that moves with pavement
  • Prevents water damage to base layers
  • Stops crack expansion & deterioration
  • Cost-effective preventative measure
$2.50per linear foot
Get Estimate
03

Pothole Patching

Professional pothole repair with hot-mix asphalt for permanent, durable fixes that blend seamlessly with existing pavement.

  • Complete pothole excavation & cleaning
  • Base repair & stabilization
  • Hot-mix asphalt fill & compaction
  • Proper bonding to existing pavement
  • Smooth, safe driving surface
  • Permanent repair solution
$150minimum · varies by size
Get Estimate
04

Asphalt Repair

Expert repair of damaged asphalt areas including edge failures, alligator cracking, settling, and surface deterioration.

  • Comprehensive damage assessment
  • Base evaluation & repair
  • Removal of failed asphalt sections
  • Hot-mix asphalt replacement
  • Proper compaction & finishing
  • Seamless integration with existing pavement
Custompricing based on scope
Get Estimate
05

Preventative Maintenance Plans

Comprehensive maintenance programs designed to maximize pavement life, minimize emergency repairs, and save thousands over time.

  • Customized maintenance schedules
  • Regular inspections & assessments
  • Scheduled sealcoating intervals
  • Priority service & scheduling
  • Discounted maintenance pricing
  • Maximize ROI on pavement investment
Contactus for custom plan pricing
Get Started
Investment Protection

Why Asphalt Maintenance Matters

Preventative maintenance is the most cost-effective way to protect your pavement investment.

Extend Pavement Life

Regular maintenance can double or triple your pavement's lifespan, delaying costly replacement by decades.

Save Thousands

Preventative maintenance costs pennies on the dollar compared to major repairs or full replacement.

Enhance Appearance

Fresh sealcoating restores that like-new look, dramatically improving curb appeal and property value.

Prevent Water Damage

Sealcoating and crack sealing prevent water infiltration that causes base failure and costly structural damage.

Timing & Frequency

When to Schedule Asphalt Maintenance

Proper timing ensures maximum effectiveness and longevity from your maintenance investment.

New

New Asphalt (0-6 Months)

Allow asphalt to cure fully before sealcoating. Monitor for settling and make any necessary minor repairs.

1-2 Yrs

First Sealcoating (1-2 Years)

Apply initial sealcoat to protect from UV damage and water infiltration. Seal any hairline cracks that appear.

3-5 Yrs

Regular Maintenance (Every 2-3 Years)

Reapply sealcoating every 2-3 years. Seal cracks promptly as they appear. Patch any developing potholes immediately.

Ongoing

Preventative Care (Ongoing)

Regular inspections, immediate crack repair, sealcoating every 2-3 years, and prompt pothole patching extend pavement life to 20-30+ years.

Central Ohio Coverage

Serving Central Ohio Since 1999

Professional asphalt maintenance services throughout Central Ohio and surrounding communities.

Primary Service Areas

  • Zanesville
  • Columbus
  • Reynoldsburg
  • Newark
  • Heath

Extended Coverage

  • Lancaster
  • Cambridge
  • New Concord
  • Dresden
  • Surrounding Communities

Don't see your city listed? Contact us — we often serve areas outside our typical service radius for larger projects.

Get a free, no-obligation estimate for your asphalt maintenance needs. Our experienced team will assess your pavement and recommend the most cost-effective maintenance plan.
